calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ruth Rowlette appeared by telephone for Jeffrey Seigrest.

Ms. Rowlette stated that the Personal Representative is not going to take fees. The Court waives sanctions and reinstates Jeffrey Seigrest as Executor of the Estate. The Court granted the First and Final Report With Waiver of Accounting, etc. and the Ex Parte Petition to Reinstate Suspended Executor, etc. (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Ex Parte Petiton To Reinstate Suspended Executor And Request For Waiver Of Previously Imposed Sanctions

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Mar-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruth Rowlette for petitioner Jeffrey Seigrist (via CourtCall).

Ms. Rowlwtte reported that she was newly engaged as counsel for the estate. She stated that she had not received the examiner's notes, but that she would be responding to them. The Court responded that an amended petition would need to be filed, and that he would have the Examiner (Sean bang) send his prior notes to her. The matter was continued to March 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Continued To Jan-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on January 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Probate Examiner's notes have not been addressed. The First and Final Report with Waiver of Accounting, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddey appeared by telephone for Jeffrey Siegrist.

The Court noted that was no appearance by anyone on August 28th and asked what happened. Mr. Dhaddey stated that he thought they could get the accounting done, apologized for not appearing and stated that he was in contact with his Client last week. Mr. Dhaddey also stated that he is waiting for his Client to review and sign the petition, and that he sent it to his Client four weeks ago. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to October 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that he is to file the petition within two weeks or the Executor will be removed and sanctions will be considered.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddey appeared by telephone for Jeffrey Seigrist.

Mr. Dhaddey stated that he filed the inventory and appraisal on June 20th, that it got rejected, that he does not know why it was rejected and that it got sent back to him on June 23rd. Mr. Dhaddey also stated that once he receives it, he will address the reason why it was rejected and then file a petition for final distribution. Report on Status of Administration is continued to August 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dhaddey is to advise his Client that if he does not sign the inventory, he will be removed.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Continued To Jun-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

At the past two hearings Counsel represented to the Court that the inventory and appraisal would be filed. To date, nothing has been filed. The Court will issue an order suspending the Executor and imposing sanctions against the Executor in the amount of $25.00 per day commencing today. Report on status of administration is continued to June 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddey for Jeffrey Seigrist.

Mr. Dhaddey stated that he has the inventory, that he will file it within the next day, and requested 30-days to finish the accounting stating that his Client had a medical issue with a family member. Report of Status of Administration is continued to May 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddey, for and with Jeffrey Seigrist.

Mr. Dhadey reported that the Inventory and Appraisal was nearly complete; he was just waiting a response from the probate referee. He expects to have the Inventory and Appraisal filed by the end of the week, and the final accounting four weeks later. He requested that the status hearing be continued for 45 days. The matter was continued to April 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Probate Accounting Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Continued To Dec-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddy for (petitioner) Jeffrey Seigrist.

The Court stated that it does not have a petition for final distribution or a status report. Mr. Dhaddy reported that the petitioner's brother is ill and that Mr. Seigrist is the primary caregiver. The Court stated that the petitioner is violating every probate rule. Mr. Dhaddy stated that there has been no distributions made, that there had been confusion, that the distributions made were out of the trust and not the estate, that the real property is in the trust and that he is having difficulty communicating with his client. The Court stated that it will continue the matter for 2 weeks and if a petition is not on file Mr. Seigrist will be suspended. The status regarding probate accounting status report was continued to December 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruvi Dhaddey, for petitioner Jeffrey Seigrist.

The Court expressed concern that estate assets are being distributed without Court approval. Mr. Dhaddey acknowledged that there has been no authority to make any distributions. The Petition to approve Status Report is denied. The Court directed that the petitioner file a new petition to approve status report, and that he will consider suspension of the administrator's powers. A status hearing was set for November 22, 2016, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
